description.value:
Forge-proofs struck into the tang — Dverg forge-masters strike a proof-mark into the tang of every weapon that passes their inspection; the mark is more than a quality stamp — it is a declaration that the weapon is what it claims to be, and nothing can pretend otherwise about the steel.

Effect: This weapon gains the Magic or Psionic keyword (choose when the imbuing is completed). Once per encounter, one strike you make with this weapon ignores damage immunity 5 on the target.

Rules: Magic/Psionic Keyword; Damage Immunity; Encounter; Strike.

project.prerequisites: A weapon of at least basic quality; a Dverg proof-stamp from a recognized forge-master
